memory.summary: A friend invited me to lunch, creating a conflict with my plan to finish the assignment analysis before reading.

goals.description: Finalize and submit the course assignment analysis section before Mon 18:00.
goals.rationale: Deadline is Mon 18:00, which is earlier than the reading deadline. Although progress is marked at 1.0, submission or final verification is required to meet the hard deadline.

goals.description: Complete and submit the assigned reading before Mon 20:00.
goals.rationale: Deadline is Mon 20:00. This task must be addressed after the assignment to ensure both deadlines are met sequentially.

agent.last_reasoning: (a) Advances g1 by protecting the 5-hour window needed to finalize the assignment before its 18:00 deadline. (b) Preserves relationship with cohort_3 by offering partial participation rather than a flat refusal, avoiding social friction while prioritizing urgent academic tasks.
